---
name: Rule disagreement
about: Issue to start a discussion on a non-proposal rule
title: "[Rule title]"
labels: disagreement
assignees: ''

---

Try to answer the following questions in order to foster a worthwhile discussion:

1. Why are you not in agreement with the rule?
2. Do you think the rule should be dropped or changed? If you'd prefer for it to be changed, what is your proposal?
3. Can you provide an example?
